title: Dish Drying Mat, 43x33cm Non-Slip Silicone Kitchen Drying Mat, Flume Drain Board Drainer Mats for Kitchen Universal Drain Board
features: 💦 HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: These Silicone Dish Drying Mat Are Made To Stand The Test Of Time. made of food-grade organic silicon, which is flexible, durable, and foldable without deformation. The temperature range is -40 to 446°F (-40 to 230°C), non-toxic, BPA-free, environmentally friendly, antibacterial and can prevent bacteria.

💦 HIGH QUALITY DESIGN - This Kitchen Drying Mat Allows You To Organize And Drain Your Kitchen Utensils And It Is Foldable For Storage.The folding design is easy to drain into the sink. Our dish drying mat has wide, raised ridges for ventilation that allow dishes to dry faster and water to evaporate quickly.

💦 WIDE USAGE - You can use them as kitchen mats,table mats, bowl mats, trivet mats, folding pot holders. It is not only used for drying tableware, but also as a preparation area for cooking, refrigerator lining, under the sink, and pet bowl mat.

💦 SAVE SPACE & EASY TO STORE - Loads of area to place crockery, pans, glasses and cutlery and leave until they dry. The flexible mat is an excellent alternative if you want to eliminate the normal type of dish drainer which takes up a lot of space. It also can be easily rolled away into the cupboard or hung for storage if you need more worktop space.

💦 EASY TO USE AND CLEAN - The draining mat built-in holes can be hung or folded to meet your needs, wipe clean or put in the dishwasher. After the dishes and cutlery are dry, put them back to the cupboard and pour the remaining water from the mat into the sink.
description: WOODFIB Dish Draining Mat, Non-Slip Silicone Kitchen Dish Draining Mat, Channel Dish Draining Board Dish Mats for Kitchen, Universal Dish Draining Board 43x33cm
